title: China's Xi Jinping secures a historic third term in power
description: Xi Jinping has secured a historic third term, cementing his position as China's most powerful leader since Mao Zedong.
keywords: Radio New Zealand, RNZ, Public Radio, News, Current Affairs, Audio, Podcasts
